name: 31_Cancer_Prediction_SVM_BreastCancer_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mradi wa utabiri wa saratani ya matiti kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya Breast Cancer Wisconsin? Pakia seti ya data na fanya uteuzi wa vipengele ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kielekezi cha SVM kwa utabiri wa saratani katika `src/model.py`. Tumia uthibitishaji wa msalaba kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Weka pamoja ripoti ya kina inayofafanua mchakato mzima-kuanzia usindikaji wa data hadi mafunzo na tathmini ya mfano. Ripoti inapaswa kufunika mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele na kujumuisha ramani ya joto ya wazi ya vipimo vya utendaji. Hifadhi ripoti kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa uteuzi wa vipengele unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri katika ripoti, ukieleza kwa nini vipengele fulani vilichaguliwa.
Ramani ya joto inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya vipimo tofauti vya utendaji, kama vile usahihi, kumbukumbu, na alama ya F1.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya utendaji wa mfano na maeneo yanayoweza kuboreshwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" inatumika.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code files (data_loader.py, model.py, train.py) are minimal semantic implementations containing only placeholder functions and requirement notes. There is no actual code that loads or uses the "Breast Cancer Wisconsin" dataset from sklearn.datasets. The trajectory evidence mentions the dataset was loaded, but the actual project files do not demonstrate this implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual feature selection logic. The code defines a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary and a `build_transforms()` function for data augmentation, but there is no implementation of feature selection techniques such as statistical methods, model-based selection, or dimensionality reduction to identify important features. The requirement notes are merely listed as strings within the file, not executed.

judge_stats.criteria: Kielekezi cha "SVM classifier" kinatumika kwa utabiri wa saratani na kinapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence from `src/model.py` shows only a minimal placeholder implementation with requirement notes and keywords. The actual code does not contain an implementation of an SVM classifier; it returns a generic "model placeholder" string. The trajectory evidence confirms the file can be executed and reloaded without errors, but there is no direct evidence of an SVM classifier being implemented within the file. The requirement specifies the SVM classifier should be implemented in `src/model.py`, which is not satisfied by the current content.

judge_stats.criteria: Uthibitishaji wa msalaba unatumika kutathmini mfano katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/train.py` file does not contain any implementation of cross-validation. The code shows a minimal semantic implementation with a simple loop that sums numbers and creates placeholder artifact files. There is no use of scikit-learn's `cross_val_score`, `KFold`, or any other cross-validation technique to evaluate an SVM or any model. The "Relevant Steps in Trajectory" describes cross-validation execution, but this is stated as reference-only environment feedback and not decisive evidence. The actual code evidence from the project workspace does not satisfy the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inachapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement to save a confusion matrix as `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` is not satisfied. The key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file: a 404 error indicating "No endpoints found that support image input." While the trajectory evidence suggests a save operation occurred without reported errors, the actual state of the workspace—specifically the inability to access the file—demonstrates the output does not exist or is not accessible in the expected location and format. The presence of an error when reading the file is decisive proof the requirement is unmet.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya kina inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na mchakato wa tathmini inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The PDF file `breast_cancer_prediction_report.pdf` is empty, as indicated by the error message "Cannot read an empty file" when attempting to read its content. While the trajectory evidence states the file was created and saved without execution errors, the actual file content is missing, meaning the detailed report containing data processing, model training, and evaluation processes does not exist.
